args.query: SELECT Id FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') ORDER BY CloseDate DESC, CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') ORDER BY CloseDate DESC, CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON oli.OpportunityId = o.Id WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') ORDER BY o.CloseDate DESC, o.CreatedDate DESC, oli.Id LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON oli.OpportunityId = o.Id WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') ORDER BY o.CloseDate DESC, o.CreatedDate DESC, oli.Id LIMIT 1;
